channel.title: Powershell on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Powershell on TLDRBins

item.title: Alternate Data Stream
item.description: Show ADS # cmd cmd /C dir /R \windows\tasks\file.txt Get-Item -Path \windows\tasks\file.txt -force -stream *

item.title: Compressed Files
item.description: Hint: Always put the zip file inside a new folder before unzip zip # zip a file zip file.zip file # zip a folder zip -r folder.zip folder/ # unzip unzip file.zip # unzip (powershell) Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory('c:\windows\tasks\file.zip', 'c:\windows\tasks\') tar.gz # Compress a file tar -cvzf file.tar.gz file # Compress a folder tar -cvzf folder.tar.gz folder/ # Extract tar -xvzf file.tar.gz gz # Compress file, and keep the original file gzip -k -r file # Compress all files individually inside a folder, and keep original files gzip -k -r folder/ # Extract gunzip file.

item.title: Defender (Windows)
item.description: Disable defender # Disable realtime monitoring Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true # Completely disable defender New-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" -Name DisableAntiSpyware -Value 1 -PropertyType DWORD -Force

item.title: Find (Windows)
item.description: Find a file ls -path \Users -Filter file.txt -recurse -erroraction silent where /R C:\Users file.txt Find a file, with rule dir /s /b /a:-d-h \Users\Administrator | findstr /i /v "appdata" +---------------------------------------+ |dir: | |/s : include subfolders | |/b : bare format | |/a:-d-h : exclude directories or hidden| | | |findstr: | |/i : case insensitive | |/v appdata : exclude 'appdata' | +---------------------------------------+ Show hidden files Get-ChildItem -force

item.title: Firewall (Windows)
item.description: Check Firewall Rules # cmd cmd /c "netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name=all|findstr Name:" # powershell Get-NetFirewallProfile # Check outbound rules Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Outbound -Enabled True

item.title: Runas
item.description: Runas (with creds) Create Cred Object $username = "domain\username" $password = "password" $secstr = New-Object -TypeName System.Security.SecureString $password.ToCharArray() | ForEach-Object {$secstr.AppendChar($_)} $cred = new-object -typename System.Management.Automation.PSCredential -argumentlist $username, $secstr Run Commnad Invoke-Command -ScriptBlock { whoami } -Credential $cred -Computer localhost # If error, try Invoke-Command -ScriptBlock { whoami } -Credential $cred -Computer localhost -auth credssp Create a new PS session new-pssession -computername . -credential $cred # Switch to new session enter-pssession 1 Runas (with cache creds) Check cache creds cmdkey /list Run Command # e.

item.title: Secure String
item.description: Decrypt secure string $s = cat pass.xml $ss = Convertto-securestring -string $s $cred = new-object -typename System.Management.Automation.PSCredential -argumentlist "administrator", $ss $cred.GetNetworkCredential().password

item.title: Windows ACLs
item.description: Window ACLs (Access Control Lists) Check ACLs # Check a file/directory icacls "C:\Users\User" # Check all files and directories icacls * /C Grant user full control icacls file_name /grant user:F +-------------------------------------------------+ |F (full access) | |M (modify access) | |RX (read and execute access) | |R (read-only access) | |W (write-only access) | |D (delete) | |RC (read control) | |WDAC (write DAC) | |WO (write owner) | |S (synchronize) | |AS (access system security) | |MA (maximum allowed) | |GR (generic read) | |GW (generic write) | |GE (generic execute) | |GA (generic all) | |RD (read data/list directory) | |WD (write data/add file) | |AD (append data/add subdirectory) | |REA (read extended attributes) | |WEA (write extended attributes) | |X (execute/traverse) | |DC (delete child) | |RA (read attributes) | |WA (write attributes) | |OI (object inherit) | |CI (container inherit) | |IO (inherit only) | |NP (do not propagate inherit) | |I (permission inherited from parent container)| +-------------------------------------------------+
